titleStmt.title: SII 28.244: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 244. (A.R. No. 399 of 1913.) TOḺUDŪR, VRIDDHACHALAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription records a royal order (tirumugam) attested by [Vā]ṇakōvaraiyaṉ. It is inscribed in characters of the 13th century.

Records that the king had granted (1/2) (vēli) of wet land (naṉ-chey) under Bhiram Maragata-chōḻa-pperiya-ēri in Chandiraśēkhara-nallūr to God Madhurāntaka-Chōḻīśvaramuḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār of Toḻuvūr in his year 9. However, while the king was staying at Āṟagaḷūr, Aṇṇa-dēvar measured the lands after reerecting a fortification wall around this ūr (Toḻuvūr) leaving Chandiraśēkhara-nallūr (out of the fortified area ?), and found that the actual extent (of plots) in this place was actually only (3/4) (of what was originally recorded). Consequently the king amended his order regarding his grant of 1/2 (vēli) (i.e. 10 mā) and granted instead 7-(1/2) mā (3/4 of 10 mā) in Toḻuvūr-vāra-ppaṟṟu. The order specified that the grant should be deemed as effective from his year 7 and also free from iṟai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumukappaṭi . toḻuvūr Uṭai
yār maturāntaka coḷiśvaramuṭaiya ṉāya
ṉāṟku cantiracekaranallūr tiruniṟṟu
piramarakatacoḻapperiya Eriyil naṉ
cey nilattu Oṉpatāvatu nāḷil tevatāṉayi
ṟaiyiliyāka nām viṭṭa naṉcey nilam Araikku Ā
ṟakaḷūrile nāmirukka Aṇṇatevar Iccantira
cekaranallūrile viṭṭu yivūr cūḻa Iṭṭa matuḷukku U
ḷḷu Akappaṭṭa nilam nikki nikki Aḷantu kaṇṭa ni
lam Oṉṟumukkālākaiyil yinnilattukku talaimāṟu
Eḻāvatu mutal viṭum naṉcey nilam Eḻumāvarai
yum toḻuvūr vārappaṟṟil naṉcey nilattu Aṭai
ttom Inta naṉcey nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum can
tirātittavaraiyum yiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭom
Ippaṭi kaṇakkil niṟuttikkuṭuppate
vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
